There's nothing more disappointing as a player than feeling like the game is holding you back. Like that time players went crazy over the shop bug.

We have other options, like making changes to characteristics through recalibration. But surprise, recalibration sucks, and you can spend 150 books and not get a good talent or sought-after attribute.

referenced_message.author: anabulsi26
referenced_message.content:
Before the game's release, I set up an alert so I could download it as soon as it was available. And that's exactly what happened. Since then, I've been trying to get the Golden OS protocol, but it only appeared today. It finally did, and it supports the Engineer feature, which I find ridiculous, especially since I play as an attacker and wear an attack outfit. I opened about 100 crates to get it, but the chances of getting it are extremely slim, almost zero, like one sperm in millions getting into a single egg.

And I won't lie to you, it was a complete failure after playing Division 1 and Division 2. I know the game is still in development, but I see many players who have already joined and others who joined late, and they're ahead of me in terms of power while I'm stuck at the same level.

content:

Math on drop rates of purple OS from repeating the weekly bounty:

25 purple os to roll
Let's say its 1/10 odds on a repeat to roll a purp, which form my extensive hours running it doesnt seem to far off par.
That translates to .4% chance to roll the specific os you want.
Which further translates to 1170 runs for a 50% chance to recieve 5 of the same.
1250 to be on average rate.
1980 to be at 90% chance
Even at 1/5 odds on a purple OS, 50% chance at 585, 90% chance at  990.

This puts a max purple in the range of 100 hours playtime on avrage- which is obviously way to high for something like this.
I got 1.2mil firepower, If T2 was added to Heroic, I would simply stop doing Elite challenge lmao
T2 gear Isnt supposed to be farmed that easily, its a reason why the devs decided to add T2 in the elite challenge/DZ/Lonewolf and even in Agent Progress, You have to earn it the hard way.

content: The drop rates for yellow chips in dz are diabolical. I got 1 in 4 days of running dz

Please add heroic nest as a daily or even better like the regular one when you can wait 15m to make it respawn. So we don't need to wait for a day or two to get gold mod.

Oh and also gold chip in dark zone, please add more places not just one place and increase the chance of it.

Thanks

I think the best solution would be to introduce a Targeted Loot system, similar to the one in The Division 2, where the player selects a set (for example: Cycle or Jackpot, etc.) they want to obtain and farms until a specific set that meets their needs appears. 

I believe this would be the most convenient solution instead of constantly repeating the same missions, which takes a lot of time hours and days of grinding and even then, in most cases, the set the player currently needs to build their character doesn’t appear. 

Currently, in the current version of the game, what appears instead are mainly weapons and equipment pieces from a set that the player doesn’t need to build the specific character they’re playing. 

I think implementing a Targeted Loot system would be the best solution to this.
Not being able to target farm certain gear sets can sometimes severely hinder progress

I’d say gold mods, gold chipsets and gold attachments globally.

One place to farm gold chipsets in the DZ is not enough. If i remember correctly, in div1 it was possible to find them in chests but it was highly nerfed or just deleted maybe. Can’t remember.

Gold mods and attachments with heroic nests is not enough. We should have more places to find and grind them.

I don’t necessarily want a buff in drop rates for weapons or gears but a buff in the rolls/stats of the loots overall. I’m throwing more than 90% of my loots today and the 10% are just between mid and okay, not even great or perfect.
or maybe even 2 slots with much more specific choices ( type of set and the specific type of armor)
yup like i wrote a bit above. literally 1 slot to choose either a specific T2 gun or T2 armor set type

**Bounty**
highend OS for sure. We need a Spot to farm those.

**Elite Mission**
Elite missions should drop only highend stuff. And make it more balance. I get rarely backpacks. In one run i get 6 kneepads and one backpack.
And you get to less armor pieces.

**Conflict**
You dont wanna change the recalibration? Than give us more books from conflict. Like 5 - 10 Books per run.

**Clan Nest**
It would be nice to have a higher difficult to get more clan resurces per run. (and please add more things to get clan resurces, like to play elite in a team of four clan members)

**Dark Zone**
Please no blue armor and weapons anymore.
The Boss in the heroic landmark should drop purple or higher skill mods and make him a little bit stronger.
Give us a second heroic landmark at the bottom of the dark zone.
Decrease the amount of players per instance. Its way to much.

**Heroic Nest**
Balance the drops of the weapon mods. The most i get is rifle and sniper mags. i rarely get smg mags. Maybe increase the drop rates lightly.

**Lone Wolf**
Make it replayable. Reset the rewards.

**Elite Patrol**
They need a complete overhaul. Make them very hard to kill like wold bosses in an MMO. So it needs some Players to kill them. (i would like to see 10+ players) Let them drop highend gear for a range of a power level. T0 level 40 players power level under 15,7k, T1 level 40 olayers over 15,7k, T2 levle 40 players over 19,2k power level.

I agree with the previous 
+
The drop of high end skill mods is too low in the dark zone
+
Dark zone drops too much useless stuff like blue and purple t0, even T1 is useless at some point especially for people who already have full T2 builds. We enter basically for mods at some point, but that too... We drop a lot of blue stuff in heroic, and we have to spend so much time dismantling drop

Drop rates for blue and greens be non existent in Heroic or make it much lower. It is still possible to get blues.

Or make targeted loot a thing for DZ, like aside from Combat mods. Have an option for Gear Type(Helmet, Armor, etc) and Weapon type(LMG, SMG, etc.)

Also possible suggestion to target Combat mods per Specialization instead of per Combat skill.
